safety_controls.description: Hypotheses with fewer than 2 evidence items are downgraded below formal reporting threshold.
Only hypotheses with confidence >= 0.6 are materialized as findings.
Potentially high-impact findings and thinly corroborated claims are flagged for analyst validation before operational use.
Hypotheses record whether evidence came from limited or multiple analytic sources.

investigation_limitations: This investigation uses network-derived evidence only and has no host-level telemetry.
Some detections rely on protocol metadata and heuristics rather than full semantic reconstruction.
Encrypted traffic may reduce visibility into true intent or content.
Threshold-based logic can reduce false positives but may also reduce recall.

hypotheses.title: Suspicious TLS Session
hypotheses.description: Suspicious TLS metadata suggests encrypted malicious communication.
false_positive_risks: Missing SNI may occur in privacy-focused or legacy environments and is not inherently malicious.
TLS on non-standard ports is suspicious but can still be legitimate.
missed_detection_risks: If JA3 is unavailable, TLS detections rely on weaker metadata signals.
Encrypted malicious traffic with normal TLS fingerprints may not be flagged.
limitations: TLS analysis may be constrained by unavailable JA3, limited SNI visibility, or incomplete handshake metadata.

findings.title: Suspicious TLS Session
findings.description: Suspicious TLS metadata suggests encrypted malicious communication.
findings.recommendation: Review certificate, SNI, JA3, and destination context; block suspicious encrypted channels pending verification.
false_positive_risks: Missing SNI may occur in privacy-focused or legacy environments and is not inherently malicious.
TLS on non-standard ports is suspicious but can still be legitimate.
missed_detection_risks: If JA3 is unavailable, TLS detections rely on weaker metadata signals.
Encrypted malicious traffic with normal TLS fingerprints may not be flagged.
limitations: TLS analysis may be constrained by unavailable JA3, limited SNI visibility, or incomplete handshake metadata.
